message:
polish(pages): standardize typography and improve code quality

Consistent typography improvements across all pages:
- Replace text-[10px] with text-xs for accessibility (minimum readable size)
- Replace tracking-[0.2em]/tracking-[0.25em] with tracking-widest for consistency
- Use Tailwind's semantic classes instead of arbitrary values

Code quality improvements:
- Use descriptive variable names (index instead of i)
- Use content-based keys for React lists (paragraph.slice(0, 50))
  instead of array indices for better reconciliation
- Remove console.error calls, use silent failure for expected errors
  (e.g., clipboard API not available in some browsers)
- Add optional id prop to FooterCTA for anchor linking

Pages updated:
- app/page.tsx: Snapshot section eyebrows, flywheel preview badge
- app/tldr/page.tsx: Flywheel explanation paragraphs, footer CTA
- app/contact/page.tsx: Typography consistency
- app/media/page.tsx: Typography consistency
- app/projects/page.tsx: Typography consistency
- app/projects/[slug]/page.tsx: Typography consistency
- app/writing/[slug]/page.tsx: Typography consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
